//: Editor/IDE typecheck for the web client (framework-free vanilla DOM). The AUTHORITATIVE CI typecheck for the whole view layer is the repo-root tsconfig.web.json (which includes this app's src plus the ui-core view files); this per-app config exists so editors resolve the same lib/options when a file under apps/client-web is opened. No JSX, no React, no Vite types. The browser EMIT is tsconfig.build.json (driven by build.ts).
